TMS system : Coal project

Polygon geofence visit detection
WorkingвҖҰ
StartingвҖҰ
Export HTML
Bake the current data into a standalone file to share. Choose what to include:

Anchors

    Draw a polygon on the map. Double-click to finish. Use вңҺ to edit shape, в–Ів–ј to reorder. Changes apply when you press Apply.

    Sequence setup

    No roles mapped
    Map each role to an anchor, set anchor order, then press Apply to recompute visits & sequences.

    Routes

    Per-leg road polylines. Draw traces a new line, Continue resumes from the end, Edit drags/inserts/deletes points, Clear removes one leg. Import JSON merges routes from a file (won't wipe other legs). ETA = remaining route distance Г· leg speed.
    LegRoad kmColorSpeedAction

    Expected routes

    Define what each route should look like. Origin opens/closes a cycle; Destination is the turnaround. Type the Front and Back waypoints separated by >, using anchor names or captions; use | for alternatives (e.g. QL49|Dakrong). Unknown names are flagged. Used only to label cycles and flag off-route / missing stops вҖ” it never breaks a cycle.
    Tag anchors as Origin / Destination on the Anchors tab. Any Origin visit splits a cycle, so an A NgoвҶ”Port shuttle is captured separately from a Mine run.

        Baked-in data (travels with file)
        Click вҶ’ select this HTML file вҶ’ saves a new copy with visits & sequences baked in. Raw GPS pings not included.

        Dispatch Plan

        Drop Dispatch Plan xlsx here
        select multiple вҖ” they merge together

        Truck Status

        Drop Truck Status xlsx here
        or click to choose

        Weighbridge

        Drop Weighbridge xlsx here
        updates the latest month only (by Date Out) В· history kept & saved
        PERIOD
        KPI Summary
        On-time Performance
        Mine / Port: Вұ1 hour vs plan  В·  Border: arrive before 19:00 BKK  В·  Backhaul: Вұ1 hour vs plan
        Plan Summary
        Average Travel / Time Spending by Location
        Backhaul Portion вҖ” QL49 & Dakrong Passage
        Issues
        Recommendation
        Counted per truck-cycle, fleet trucks only. вҖңAs plannedвҖқ = a plan cycle the truck ran. Stage durations use actual (sequence) times; each value is the average across cycles.
        Period FLEET
        Counted per truck-cycle, fleet trucks only. Symbols вҖ” ● came as planned · ✕ did not come · ■ came, not in plan · ◆ manual entry (not scored). A note like -1 means the truck arrived that many days before its matched plan.
        Cross-references the Dispatch Plan against GPS-derived sequences. Right-click any actual cell to set a manual time.
        Year Month
        Date Cycle click В· Ctrl=add В· Shift=range
        Trucks that ran with no matching plan. Right-click a row to assign it to a plan cycle.

        How to use this program

        This is a simple, step-by-step guide. Read it like a recipe. Do the steps in order. You do not need to know computers.

        The big idea (read this first)

        This program looks at where the trucks went (GPS), compares it to the plan, and tells you if trucks are early, on time, or late. You give it files. It does the math. You read the results.

        The red circle is where trucks wait the most: the QL49 road only opens at set hours.

        Order to do things:

        1. Open Data input вҶ’ Parameter and make sure the map zones (anchors) are there.
        2. Open Data input вҶ’ GPS Data, drop the truck GPS file, press Calculate.
        3. Open Data input вҶ’ Dispatch Plan, drop the plan file.
        4. Look at Performance and Plan vs Actual.

        The top menu (the buttons at the very top)

        • Performance вҖ” the report card. Shows on-time %, trip time, and problems. This opens first.
        • Data вҖ” the detailed lists: every trip, every route, and a timeline picture.
        • Data input в–ҫ вҖ” click it, a small menu drops down. This is where you put files in.
        • Plan vs Actual вҖ” plan time next to real time, side by side.
        • Fleet вҖ” the list of your trucks.
        • рҹ“– Guide вҖ” this page.

        Data input в–ҫ вҶ’ GPS Data (where the trucks went)

        What it is: the truck location files from the GPS company.

        How to use:

        1. Drag the file onto the grey box, or click the box and choose the file. (Excel or CSV is fine.)
        2. A small box pops up and shows what the program is doing. Wait for it.
        3. The file is now staged (waiting). You can add more files.
        4. Press the blue Calculate button. The program works out every visit and trip.

        Important: the GPS file does not save by itself. Use Export HTML (below) to keep it.

        Data input в–ҫ вҶ’ Parameter (the map zones)

        What it is: the circles/shapes on the map that mark Mine, Border, Port, etc. The program checks if a truck is inside a zone.

        How to use: usually this is already set up. You only touch it if a zone is wrong. Tabs inside: Anchor (the zones), Routes (the road lines and colours), Expected (the normal path a truck should follow).

        Data input в–ҫ вҶ’ Dispatch Plan (the plan)

        What it is: the schedule вҖ” which truck should arrive where, and when.

        How to use: drop the plan Excel file on the box. You can drop several files at once; they join together. To start over, press Clear.

        Data input в–ҫ вҶ’ Truck Status (the daily note)

        What it is: a daily note for each truck (for example: front haul, back haul, maintenance, waiting to unload).

        How to use: drop the status file. You get a colour grid: one row per truck, one column per day. Colours tell the status fast. Use From / To to look at certain days only.

        Data input в–ҫ вҶ’ Weighbridge (the loading scale)

        What it is: the scale records вҖ” which truck loaded coal and how heavy.

        How to use: drop the daily file. It updates only the latest month (decided by the Date Out column) and keeps every earlier month already stored. It shows a short summary per truck (loadings, average net, average dwell). Data is saved between sessions and travels with Export HTML; use Clear for a clean reset.

        Subcontractor fleet status (are the trucks coming back?)

        What it is: a daily list from the subcontractor. It shows every truck and, for the trucks coming back, the time they expect to reach the Mine.

        The file needs a header row with these columns:

        • No вҖ” row number.
        • Plate вҖ” the truck plate, for example 43H-168.35.
        • Location вҖ” where the truck is now.
        • Status вҖ” Loaded or Empty.
        • Note вҖ” the haul direction: Front haul, Back haul, or Maintenance.
        • Time arrive Mine вҖ” the hour the truck will reach the Mine. Fill this only for back-haul trucks.
        • Date arrive Mine вҖ” the day the truck will reach the Mine. Fill this only for back-haul trucks.

        How to use: open this tab and drop the file on the grey box. The program reads it at once and saves it for next time.

        What you see: for each truck it shows the declared haul, status, location, the claimed arrival at the Mine, the estimated arrival from GPS for back-haul trucks, the difference between them, and a GPS check.

        GPS check: Returning means GPS agrees the truck is coming back. At mine means it already arrived. Not returning means GPS shows it still going out. No GPS means there is no signal for that truck.

        The estimated arrival only shows for back-haul trucks, because only a returning truck has a real arrival time to the Mine.

        Plate matching ignores spaces, dashes and dots, so 43H-168.35 and 43H168.35 are the same truck.

        Performance (the report card)

        What it is: the easy summary of how the fleet is doing.

        What you see, top to bottom:

        • Period вҖ” pick the month you want to look at.
        • KPI Summary вҖ” the big numbers: trucks loading, trips per truck, plan achievement, time per trip.
        • On-time Performance вҖ” green bar = on time, red = late. Bigger green is better.
        • Average Travel / Time Spending вҖ” how long each part of the road takes, plan vs real.
        • Backhaul вҖ” the return trip route (QL49 or Dakrong).
        • Issues and Recommendation вҖ” empty boxes you can type into. Write problems and ideas here; they save by themselves.

        Plan vs Actual (side by side)

        What it is: for each trip, the plan time on top (grey) and the real time under it (yellow). Red means missing.

        How to use:

        • Use the chips (Year / Month / Date / Cycle) at the top to choose what to show. Click one; hold Ctrl to pick more; hold Shift to pick a range.
        • Right-click a yellow time box to type a time by hand (if GPS missed it). A small box appears where your mouse is.
        • The Unplanned tab lists trucks that drove with no plan. Right-click a row to attach it to a plan.

        Data (the detailed lists)

        What it is: three tabs вҖ” Sequence (every full trip), Route (path check), Timeline (a colour picture across days).

        The filter bar at the top controls all of them:

        • Date range вҖ” choose the days.
        • Trucks / Anchors вҖ” choose which trucks or zones.
        • Active range only вҖ” hide trucks that were not active in those days (a truck with no end date counts as active until today).
        • Fleet scope вҖ” All / In fleet / Not in fleet / Deactivated. Deactivated shows only deactivated trucks (including those auto-deactivated once their Effective To date passes), ignoring the date-range filter.
        • Reset filters вҖ” put everything back.

        Fleet (your trucks)

        What it is: the list of trucks, their status (online, maintenance, broken, deactivated), phone, GPS company, and the dates they are active.

        How to use: type in a box to change it; it saves by itself. Leave Effective To empty if the truck is still working ("вҶ’ Now"). You can also upload a fleet Excel or download a blank template.

        Export HTML (save and share)

        What it is: makes one file that holds the program and your data, so someone else can open it and see everything вҖ” no files needed.

        How to use: Go to Data input вҶ’ GPS Data, press в¬Ү Export HTML, then choose:

        • Performance only вҖ” a small file that opens straight to the report card.
        • Everything вҖ” the whole program with all data inside.

        A file downloads. Send it by email or chat. The other person just double-clicks it.

        If something looks wrong

        • I changed something but nothing happened. You may have opened an old downloaded file. Open the newest one, and press Ctrl + F5 to refresh.
        • The page is slow. Very big files take time. Wait for the status box to finish.
        • A truck shows when it should not. Check its dates on the Fleet tab, and the Active range only box on the Data tab.
        • Numbers look empty. Make sure you loaded GPS (and pressed Calculate) and the Dispatch Plan.

        CГЎch sб»ӯ dб»Ҙng chЖ°ЖЎng trГ¬nh

        ДҗГўy lГ  hЖ°б»ӣng dбә«n Д‘ЖЎn giбәЈn, tб»«ng bЖ°б»ӣc. HГЈy Д‘б»Қc nhЖ° mб»ҷt cГҙng thб»©c nбәҘu Дғn. LГ m theo Д‘Гәng thб»© tб»ұ. BбәЎn khГҙng cбә§n biбәҝt vб»Ғ mГЎy tГӯnh.

        Гқ tЖ°б»ҹng chГӯnh (Д‘б»Қc trЖ°б»ӣc)

        ChЖ°ЖЎng trГ¬nh nГ y xem xe Д‘ГЈ Д‘i Д‘Гўu (GPS), so sГЎnh vб»ӣi kбәҝ hoбәЎch, vГ  cho biбәҝt xe Д‘бәҝn sб»ӣm, Д‘Гәng giб»қ hay trб»…. BбәЎn Д‘Ж°a tб»Үp vГ o. ChЖ°ЖЎng trГ¬nh tГӯnh toГЎn. BбәЎn Д‘б»Қc kбәҝt quбәЈ.

        Thб»© tб»ұ thб»ұc hiб»Үn:

        1. Mб»ҹ Nhбәӯp dб»Ҝ liб»Үu вҶ’ Tham sб»‘ vГ  kiб»ғm tra cГЎc vГ№ng trГӘn bбәЈn Д‘б»“ (Д‘iб»ғm mб»‘c) Д‘ГЈ cГі chЖ°a.
        2. Mб»ҹ Nhбәӯp dб»Ҝ liб»Үu вҶ’ Dб»Ҝ liб»Үu GPS, thбәЈ tб»Үp GPS cб»§a xe, bбәҘm TГӯnh toГЎn.
        3. Mб»ҹ Nhбәӯp dб»Ҝ liб»Үu вҶ’ Kбәҝ hoбәЎch Д‘iб»Ғu xe, thбәЈ tб»Үp kбәҝ hoбәЎch.
        4. Xem Hiб»Үu suбәҘt vГ  Kбәҝ hoбәЎch & Thб»ұc tбәҝ.

        Menu trГӘn cГ№ng (cГЎc nГәt б»ҹ trГӘn cГ№ng)

        • Hiб»Үu suбәҘt вҖ” bбәЈng Д‘iб»ғm. Hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ % Д‘Гәng giб»қ, thб»қi gian chuyбәҝn vГ  cГЎc vбәҘn Д‘б»Ғ. Mб»ҹ Д‘бә§u tiГӘn.
        • Dб»Ҝ liб»Үu вҖ” danh sГЎch chi tiбәҝt: tб»«ng chuyбәҝn, tб»«ng tuyбәҝn, vГ  hГ¬nh бәЈnh dГІng thб»қi gian.
        • Nhбәӯp dб»Ҝ liб»Үu в–ҫ вҖ” bбәҘm vГ o, mб»ҷt menu nhб»Ҹ sбәҪ hiб»Үn ra. ДҗГўy lГ  nЖЎi bбәЎn Д‘Ж°a tб»Үp vГ o.
        • Kбәҝ hoбәЎch & Thб»ұc tбәҝ вҖ” giб»қ kбәҝ hoбәЎch vГ  giб»қ thб»ұc tбәҝ Д‘бә·t cбәЎnh nhau.
        • Дҗб»ҷi xe вҖ” danh sГЎch cГЎc xe cб»§a bбәЎn.
        • рҹ“– HЖ°б»ӣng dбә«n вҖ” trang nГ y.

        Nhбәӯp dб»Ҝ liб»Үu в–ҫ вҶ’ Dб»Ҝ liб»Үu GPS (xe Д‘ГЈ Д‘i Д‘Гўu)

        LГ  gГ¬: tб»Үp vб»Ӣ trГӯ xe tб»« cГҙng ty GPS.

        CГЎch dГ№ng:

        1. KГ©o tб»Үp vГ o Гҙ mГ u xГЎm, hoбә·c bбәҘm vГ o Гҙ vГ  chб»Қn tб»Үp. (Excel hoбә·c CSV Д‘б»Ғu Д‘Ж°б»Јc.)
        2. Mб»ҷt Гҙ nhб»Ҹ hiб»Үn ra cho biбәҝt chЖ°ЖЎng trГ¬nh Д‘ang lГ m gГ¬. HГЈy chб»қ.
        3. Tб»Үp Д‘ГЈ Д‘Ж°б»Јc xбәҝp hГ ng (Д‘ang chб»қ). BбәЎn cГі thб»ғ thГӘm tб»Үp khГЎc.
        4. BбәҘm nГәt TГӯnh toГЎn mГ u xanh. ChЖ°ЖЎng trГ¬nh sбәҪ tГӯnh mб»Қi lЖ°б»Јt ghГ© vГ  chuyбәҝn Д‘i.

        Quan trб»Қng: tб»Үp GPS khГҙng tб»ұ lЖ°u. DГ№ng XuбәҘt HTML (bГӘn dЖ°б»ӣi) Д‘б»ғ giб»Ҝ lбәЎi.

        Nhбәӯp dб»Ҝ liб»Үu в–ҫ вҶ’ Tham sб»‘ (vГ№ng trГӘn bбәЈn Д‘б»“)

        LГ  gГ¬: cГЎc vГІng trГІn/hГ¬nh trГӘn bбәЈn Д‘б»“ Д‘ГЎnh dбәҘu Mб»Ҹ, BiГӘn giб»ӣi, CбәЈng, v.v. ChЖ°ЖЎng trГ¬nh kiб»ғm tra xe cГі nбәұm trong vГ№ng khГҙng.

        CГЎch dГ№ng: thЖ°б»қng Д‘ГЈ Д‘Ж°б»Јc thiбәҝt lбәӯp sбәөn. Chб»ү chб»үnh khi mб»ҷt vГ№ng bб»Ӣ sai. CГЎc thбә» bГӘn trong: Дҗiб»ғm mб»‘c (cГЎc vГ№ng), Tuyбәҝn Д‘Ж°б»қng (cГЎc Д‘Ж°б»қng vГ  mГ u), Tuyбәҝn dб»ұ kiбәҝn (Д‘Ж°б»қng xe nГӘn Д‘i).

        Nhбәӯp dб»Ҝ liб»Үu в–ҫ вҶ’ Kбәҝ hoбәЎch Д‘iб»Ғu xe (kбәҝ hoбәЎch)

        LГ  gГ¬: lб»Ӣch вҖ” xe nГ o Д‘бәҝn Д‘Гўu, lГәc nГ o.

        CГЎch dГ№ng: thбәЈ tб»Үp Excel kбәҝ hoбәЎch vГ o Гҙ. CГі thб»ғ thбәЈ nhiб»Ғu tб»Үp cГ№ng lГәc; chГәng sбәҪ ghГ©p lбәЎi. BбәҘm XГіa Д‘б»ғ lГ m lбәЎi.

        Nhбәӯp dб»Ҝ liб»Үu в–ҫ вҶ’ TrбәЎng thГЎi xe (ghi chГә hбәұng ngГ y)

        LГ  gГ¬: ghi chГә hбәұng ngГ y cho mб»—i xe (vГӯ dб»Ҙ: chiб»Ғu Д‘i, chiб»Ғu vб»Ғ, bбәЈo trГ¬, chб»қ dб»Ў hГ ng).

        CГЎch dГ№ng: thбәЈ tб»Үp trбәЎng thГЎi. BбәЎn sбәҪ thбәҘy lЖ°б»ӣi mГ u: mб»—i hГ ng mб»ҷt xe, mб»—i cб»ҷt mб»ҷt ngГ y. MГ u sбәҜc cho biбәҝt trбәЎng thГЎi nhanh. DГ№ng Tб»« / Дҗбәҝn Д‘б»ғ chб»ү xem mб»ҷt sб»‘ ngГ y.

        Nhбәӯp dб»Ҝ liб»Үu в–ҫ вҶ’ TrбәЎm cГўn (cГўn bб»‘c hГ ng)

        LГ  gГ¬: dб»Ҝ liб»Үu cГўn вҖ” xe nГ o bб»‘c than vГ  nбә·ng bao nhiГӘu.

        CГЎch dГ№ng: thбәЈ tб»Үp. Hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ tГіm tбәҜt ngбәҜn cho mб»—i xe (sб»‘ lбә§n bб»‘c, trб»Қng lЖ°б»Јng trung bГ¬nh, thб»қi gian chб»қ trung bГ¬nh). Tб»Үp nГ y khГҙng Д‘Ж°б»Јc lЖ°u giб»Ҝa cГЎc phiГӘn вҖ” hГЈy thбәЈ lбәЎi lбә§n sau, hoбә·c dГ№ng XuбәҘt HTML.

        Hiб»Үu suбәҘt (bбәЈng Д‘iб»ғm)

        LГ  gГ¬: bбәЈn tГіm tбәҜt dб»… hiб»ғu vб»Ғ tГ¬nh hГ¬nh Д‘б»ҷi xe.

        BбәЎn thбәҘy gГ¬, tб»« trГӘn xuб»‘ng:

        • Kб»і вҖ” chб»Қn thГЎng (hoбә·c вҖңHГҙm quaвҖқ) bбәЎn muб»‘n xem.
        • TГіm tбәҜt KPI вҖ” cГЎc con sб»‘ lб»ӣn: xe Д‘ang bб»‘c hГ ng, sб»‘ chuyбәҝn mб»—i xe, mб»©c Д‘бәЎt kбәҝ hoбәЎch, thб»қi gian mб»—i chuyбәҝn.
        • Hiб»Үu suбәҘt Д‘Гәng giб»қ вҖ” thanh xanh = Д‘Гәng giб»қ, Д‘б»Ҹ = trб»…. CГ ng nhiб»Ғu xanh cГ ng tб»‘t.
        • Thб»қi gian di chuyб»ғn / dб»«ng trung bГ¬nh вҖ” mб»—i Д‘oбәЎn Д‘Ж°б»қng mбәҘt bao lГўu, kбәҝ hoбәЎch so vб»ӣi thб»ұc tбәҝ.
        • Chiб»Ғu vб»Ғ вҖ” tuyбәҝn Д‘Ж°б»қng vб»Ғ (QL49 hoбә·c ДҗakrГҙng).
        • VбәҘn Д‘б»Ғ vГ  Khuyбәҝn nghб»Ӣ вҖ” Гҙ trб»‘ng bбәЎn cГі thб»ғ gГө vГ o. Ghi vбәҘn Д‘б»Ғ vГ  ГҪ tЖ°б»ҹng tбәЎi Д‘Гўy; tб»ұ Д‘б»ҷng lЖ°u.

        Kбәҝ hoбәЎch & Thб»ұc tбәҝ (Д‘бә·t cбәЎnh nhau)

        LГ  gГ¬: vб»ӣi mб»—i chuyбәҝn, giб»қ kбәҝ hoбәЎch б»ҹ trГӘn (xГЎm) vГ  giб»қ thб»ұc tбәҝ б»ҹ dЖ°б»ӣi (vГ ng). Дҗб»Ҹ nghД©a lГ  thiбәҝu.

        CГЎch dГ№ng:

        • DГ№ng cГЎc chip (NДғm / ThГЎng / NgГ y / Chu trГ¬nh) б»ҹ trГӘn Д‘б»ғ chб»Қn nб»ҷi dung hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ. BбәҘm mб»ҷt cГЎi; giб»Ҝ Ctrl Д‘б»ғ chб»Қn nhiб»Ғu; giб»Ҝ Shift Д‘б»ғ chб»Қn mб»ҷt dбәЈi.
        • BбәҘm chuб»ҷt phбәЈi vГ o Гҙ giб»қ mГ u vГ ng Д‘б»ғ nhбәӯp giб»қ bбәұng tay (nбәҝu GPS bб»Ӣ thiбәҝu). Mб»ҷt Гҙ nhб»Ҹ hiб»Үn ra tбәЎi vб»Ӣ trГӯ con trб»Ҹ.
        • Thбә» NgoГ i kбәҝ hoбәЎch liб»Үt kГӘ cГЎc xe chбәЎy mГ  khГҙng cГі kбәҝ hoбәЎch. BбәҘm chuб»ҷt phбәЈi vГ o mб»ҷt hГ ng Д‘б»ғ gбәҜn vГ o mб»ҷt kбәҝ hoбәЎch.

        Dб»Ҝ liб»Үu (danh sГЎch chi tiбәҝt)

        LГ  gГ¬: ba thбә» вҖ” Chu trГ¬nh (mб»—i chuyбәҝn Д‘бә§y Д‘б»§), Tuyбәҝn Д‘Ж°б»қng (kiб»ғm tra Д‘Ж°б»қng Д‘i), DГІng thб»қi gian (hГ¬nh mГ u theo ngГ y).

        Thanh bб»ҷ lб»Қc б»ҹ trГӘn Д‘iб»Ғu khiб»ғn tбәҘt cбәЈ:

        • KhoбәЈng ngГ y вҖ” chб»Қn cГЎc ngГ y.
        • Xe / Дҗiб»ғm mб»‘c вҖ” chб»Қn xe hoбә·c vГ№ng nГ o.
        • Chб»ү xe Д‘ang hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng вҖ” бә©n cГЎc xe khГҙng hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng trong nhб»Ҝng ngГ y Д‘Гі (xe khГҙng cГі ngГ y kбәҝt thГәc Д‘Ж°б»Јc tГӯnh lГ  hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng Д‘бәҝn hГҙm nay).
        • PhбәЎm vi Д‘б»ҷi xe вҖ” TбәҘt cбәЈ / Trong Д‘б»ҷi xe / NgoГ i Д‘б»ҷi xe.
        • Дҗбә·t lбәЎi bб»ҷ lб»Қc вҖ” Д‘Ж°a mб»Қi thб»© vб»Ғ ban Д‘бә§u.

        Дҗб»ҷi xe (cГЎc xe cб»§a bбәЎn)

        LГ  gГ¬: danh sГЎch xe, trбәЎng thГЎi (trб»ұc tuyбәҝn, bбәЈo trГ¬, hб»Ҹng, ngб»«ng), Д‘iб»Үn thoбәЎi, cГҙng ty GPS, vГ  cГЎc ngГ y hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng.

        CГЎch dГ№ng: gГө vГ o Гҙ Д‘б»ғ thay Д‘б»•i; tб»ұ Д‘б»ҷng lЖ°u. Дҗб»ғ trб»‘ng Hiб»Үu lб»ұc Д‘бәҝn nбәҝu xe vбә«n Д‘ang chбәЎy (вҖңвҶ’ NowвҖқ). BбәЎn cЕ©ng cГі thб»ғ tбәЈi lГӘn Excel Д‘б»ҷi xe hoбә·c tбәЈi mбә«u trб»‘ng.

        XuбәҘt HTML (lЖ°u vГ  chia sбә»)

        LГ  gГ¬: tбәЎo mб»ҷt tб»Үp chб»©a cбәЈ chЖ°ЖЎng trГ¬nh vГ  dб»Ҝ liб»Үu cб»§a bбәЎn, Д‘б»ғ ngЖ°б»қi khГЎc mб»ҹ ra xem mб»Қi thб»© вҖ” khГҙng cбә§n tб»Үp nГ o khГЎc.

        CГЎch dГ№ng: VГ o Nhбәӯp dб»Ҝ liб»Үu вҶ’ Dб»Ҝ liб»Үu GPS, bбәҘm в¬Ү XuбәҘt HTML, rб»“i chб»Қn:

        • Chб»ү Hiб»Үu suбәҘt вҖ” tб»Үp nhб»Ҹ, mб»ҹ thбәіng vГ o bбәЈng Д‘iб»ғm.
        • TбәҘt cбәЈ вҖ” toГ n bб»ҷ chЖ°ЖЎng trГ¬nh kГЁm mб»Қi dб»Ҝ liб»Үu.

        Mб»ҷt tб»Үp sбәҪ tбәЈi vб»Ғ. Gб»ӯi qua email hoбә·c tin nhбәҜn. NgЖ°б»қi kia chб»ү cбә§n bбәҘm Д‘Гәp Д‘б»ғ mб»ҹ.

        Nбәҝu cГі gГ¬ Д‘Гі khГҙng Д‘Гәng

        • TГҙi Д‘ГЈ thay Д‘б»•i nhЖ°ng khГҙng thбәҘy gГ¬. CГі thб»ғ bбәЎn Д‘ang mб»ҹ tб»Үp cЕ© Д‘ГЈ tбәЈi. HГЈy mб»ҹ tб»Үp mб»ӣi nhбәҘt vГ  bбәҘm Ctrl + F5 Д‘б»ғ lГ m mб»ӣi.
        • Trang chбәЎy chбәӯm. Tб»Үp rбәҘt lб»ӣn cбә§n thб»қi gian. HГЈy chб»қ Гҙ trбәЎng thГЎi xong.
        • Mб»ҷt xe hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ khi khГҙng nГӘn. Kiб»ғm tra ngГ y cб»§a xe б»ҹ thбә» Дҗб»ҷi xe, vГ  Гҙ Chб»ү xe Д‘ang hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng б»ҹ thбә» Dб»Ҝ liб»Үu.
        • CГЎc con sб»‘ trб»‘ng. HГЈy chбәҜc chбәҜn bбәЎn Д‘ГЈ tбәЈi GPS (vГ  bбәҘm TГӯnh toГЎn) vГ  Kбәҝ hoбәЎch Д‘iб»Ғu xe.
